summary: Session 4 completed the webview foundation for the new router-config editor. New module tree at tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/configEditor/: yamlReadWrite.ts (AST-mode read/write via yaml@2.7, atomic tmp+rename writes, parseErrors surfacing for malformed YAML), schemaValidator.ts (three Ajv-compiled schemas + cross-file invariants: env-var pattern with minLength 1, model-provider ref resolution, local-overrides allowlist closing additionalProperties: false on every known nested object, friendly-message dedup against Ajv additionalProperties errors via _ajvErrorPath helper), ConfigEditorPanel.ts (singleton webview panel, 6-section nav shell with 'Coming in Session 5' placeholders, drift-detected + YAML-parse-error banners on load, HTML-escaped error paths, round-trip atomic save flow, missing-file fallback for both router-config.yaml and budget.yaml). Command dabbler.openConfigEditor registered in package.json + wired in extension.ts. Five rounds of cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4) raised 8 Major + 4 Minor across rounds 1-4; round 5 cleared with only one trivial cleanup nit which was fixed. All Blocker/Major findings either resolved or documented in code as deliberate scope decisions (router-config and budget schemas remain open because the real files carry many non-Appendix-B fields). One pre-verification fix: a TypeScript `as HTMLElement` cast inside the inline webview <script> template literal was a runtime SyntaxError; replaced with plain JS. Test count: 29 -> 38 unit tests passing; tsc clean. Total Session 4 verification spend: $1.31 of $10.00 NTE (cumulative Set 026 to date: ~$1.85).

reason.specifics: Session 5 implements the six webview sections inside the Session 4 shell — largest single-session surface in the set (~6 section files + ~6 test files, plus half-batch recovery + shared/local indicator). Spec routing notes call for Opus at high effort. Implementing orchestrator may split into 5a + 5b if the conversation budget gets tight.
